title: Challengers
description:
Tatsumi Tomoe is a smart but very naive 18 year old boy, he travels to Tokyo to take a college entrance exam where he meets a salaryman named Kurokawa Mitsugu. Kurokawa falls in love with him but Tomoe is oblivious... and he has a super overprotective brother, Souichi, who doesn't trust Kurokawa at all. 

I only translated the chapters that focused on Souichi and Morinaga, who are the main characters in Koisuru Boukun.
author: Takanaga Hinako

12.title: Volume 3 Chapter 3: There's a Possibility Part 1
